HI STORY OF PRESENT LLNESS: This is a 54-year-old with past medical history of end-stage renal disease on dialysis Monday, Wednesday, Friday, coronary artery disease and stent placement x5 in December. Presented to the ED after another fall at home. Recently admitted to an outside facility for nosebleed and fall. She was stabilized, resumed on her Plavix and aspirin. She went on the toilet. When she tried to get up, she fell. Then was having left leg pain. Unable to anbul ate. She could not go to dialysis, missed dialysis on Wednesday. CT of the left Lower extremity did not show any acute fractures or findings. The patient's labs showed hyperkal a. Treated in the ED. She was admitted for continued dialysis and treatments. PAST MEDI CAL HI STORY: End-stage renal disease on HD. Coronary artery disease and stents x5. Hypotension at times. Hyperlipidemia. ALLERGI ES: PENI allin FAM LY HI STORY: Noncontributory to the current presentation. SOCI AL HI STORY: She denies tobacco, al cohol , illicit drug use.
